question: Define a `struct Student` that contains `char name[50]`, `int studentID`, and `float GPA`. Create an array of 2 `Student` objects. Allow the user to input data for each student. Finally, print the details of both students.

test_cases.input:
Charlie Brown
abc
101
3.9
David Lee
xyz
102
3.1
test_cases.expected:
Enter details for student 1:
Name (max 49 chars): Student ID: Invalid input. Please enter an integer for Student ID: GPA: Enter details for student 2:
Name (max 49 chars): Student ID: Invalid input. Please enter an integer for Student ID: GPA: 
--- Student Details ---
Student 1:
  Name: Charlie Brown
  ID: 101
  GPA: 3.9
Student 2:
  Name: David Lee
  ID: 102
  GPA: 3.1
